hero.desc: Venus Gecko: Your Living Jewel. We focus on the wonder of life rather than artificial splendor.

about.title:
Living Jewel,
Beyond Value
about.desc: Venus Gecko is more than just a breeder; we propose an artistic lifestyle. Experience the unique quality that awakens the senses of the modern generation.
about.gem_desc: We define geckos as 'dynamic art' rather than just pets. We deliver the wonder felt the moment eyes meet.

item1.title: Pure Quality
item1.desc: We showcase only top-tier morphs that have undergone strict selection processes.

item2.title: Artistic Care
item2.desc: We maintain the best condition in a delicate environment, treating them like gems.

item3.title: Premium Trust
item3.desc: We promise continuous management and communication even after adoption.

gallery.title: Digital Showroom
gallery.desc: Explore our rare and exclusive lineup of geckos.

location.title: Visit Our Space
location.desc: Experience the Venus Gecko showroom filled with living jewels. Meet geckos waiting for adoption cared for in the finest environment.
